name: vivim-monorepo
description: VIVIM Monorepo - PWA, Server, Network Engine, and Admin Panel

scripts.dev:core: concurrently --kill-others --prefix "[{name}]" --names "PWA,SRV,WS,ADM" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta" "bun run dev:pwa" "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:network:ws" "bun run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others --prefix "[{name}]" --names "PWA,SRV,WS,ADM,DASH,AGNT" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue,white" "bun run dev:pwa" "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:network:ws" "bun run dev:admin" "bun run dev:dashboard" "bun run dev:agent"
scripts.setup: bun run setup:deps && bun run setup:db
scripts.setup:db: cd server && bun run db:generate && bun run db:migrate && cd ../network && bun run db:generate
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --prefix "[{name}]" --names "PWA,SRV,WS,ADM" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta" "cd pwa && bun run preview" "cd server && bun run start" "cd network && bun run start" "cd admin-panel && bun run preview"
scripts.build: bun install && cd pwa && bun run build && cd ../server && bun run build && cd ../network && bun run build && cd ../admin-panel && bun run build
scripts.build:all: bun run build && cd sdk && bun run build && cd apps/public-dashboard && bun run build
scripts.test: bun test && cd pwa && bun test && cd ../server && bun test && cd ../network && bun test && cd ../admin-panel && bun test

author: VIVIM Team
